message:
fix(native-events): resolve compiler warnings in native event listener

- Add #[allow(dead_code)] on WireEvent enum to suppress unused variant
  warnings (variants are populated by serde deserialization)
- Remove unnecessary mut on self parameter in NativeEventListener::run
- Use let _ = bus.publish(event) to explicitly discard the Result
  return value from EventBus::publish

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
